mapper.select: SELECT /* base.ec.pm :: PmPlan :: selectById */ * , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , cd_pt.code_label AS plan_type_cd_nm , cd_ps.code_label AS plan_status_cd_nm FROM pm_plan p LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_pt ON cd_pt.code_grp = 'PLAN_TYPE' AND cd_pt.code_value = plan_type_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_ps ON cd_ps.code_grp = 'PLAN_STATUS' AND cd_ps.code_value = plan_status_cd WHERE plan_id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) /* base.ec.pm :: PmPlan :: selectPageCount */ FROM pm_plan p
